9	/**
10	 * CLass for handling links to Kubernetes documentation
11	 */
12	public class KubeLinker implements Linker {
13	    private final String baseUrl;
14	
15	    /**
16	     * Constructs the KubeLinker and initializes the base URL to the Kubernetes documentation
17	     *
18	     * @param baseUrl   The base URL to the Kubernetes documentation which should be used
19	     */
20	    public KubeLinker(String baseUrl) {
21	        // E.g. https://kubernetes.io/docs/reference/generated/kubernetes-api/v1.11/
22	        this.baseUrl = baseUrl;
23	    }
24	
25	    /**
26	     * Generates an URL to the Kubernetes documentation to some specific part of the Kube API
27	     *
28	     * @param kubeLink  Specifies the Kubernetes API which should the link point to
29	     *
30	     * @return  An HTTP link deep-linking to the Kubernetes documentation
31	     */
32	    @Override
33	    public String link(KubeLink kubeLink) {
34	        // E.g. https://kubernetes.io/docs/reference/generated/kubernetes-api/v1.11/#networkpolicyingressrule-v1-networking-k8s-io
35	        return baseUrl + "#" + kubeLink.kind() + "-" + kubeLink.version() + "-" + kubeLink.group().replace(".", "-");
36	    }
37	}

Implemented `@ExternalLink` support for CRD documentation generation.

Changes made:
- Added new annotation:
  - `crd-generator/src/main/java/io/strimzi/crdgenerator/annotations/ExternalLink.java`
  - Runtime-retained, usable on methods and fields
  - Accepts a URL via `value()`
- Updated `DocGenerator` to:
  - Detect both `@KubeLink` and `@ExternalLink` as external documentation links
  - Use the literal URL from `@ExternalLink`
  - Continue using `KubeLinker` for `@KubeLink`
  - Avoid generating nested type docs for externally linked properties, matching existing `@KubeLink` behavior

Validation:
- Added temporary regression coverage using `@ExternalLink("https://example.com/external-link")`
- Confirmed the test failed before implementation due to missing `ExternalLink`
- Implemented the fix
- Confirmed the targeted test passed:
  - `mvn -pl crd-generator -Dtest=DocGeneratorTest test`
- Removed the temporary regression test/resource edits as requested

Final working tree contains only the implementation changes, with no committed edits.
